text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 30. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
